rag_rules: Use assign only for implementation outputs or auxiliary variables
Place guarantees in type scope only for visible features with concrete bounds
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Use nested if ... then ... else for branching logic
Use AGREE logical operators (and, or, not, =>) for contract expressions
generic_rules: Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers in guarantees
Align helper declaration types with expression types
Use AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool) for declarations
Trace unresolved references before adding architecture
Use case-provided thresholds and legal feature names
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Use nested if ... then ... else for branching logic
Use AGREE logical operators (and, or, not, =>) for contract expressions
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantees in implementation scope
Do not use subcomponent ports in type scope contracts
Do not use assignment statements in component types
Do not use unresolved references in guarantees
Do not use invalid AGREE scalar type names
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics about assignment statements in component types
AGREE validator diagnostics about unresolved references to distanceFromFence
